templates.label: Coaching Reply
messages: Hi! I'm a professional tennis coach based in Sydney with availability for new students. Feel free to DM me if you're interested! 🎾
Hey! I coach tennis in Sydney — happy to chat about lessons or hitting sessions. Send me a DM! 😊
Hi there! I'd love to help — I'm a tennis coach in Sydney. DM me for more details!
